_comment: Spoiled Child 'The Perfect Morning Routine = 4 Products' — the worked example (v3 shipped recipe). Copy to config.json and edit. A flat-vector creator-character walks a countable 4-step routine, one step per beat: large corner numeral + labelled chip + tagline + the step's REAL product photo. Character scenes are Kling i2v off text-stripped clean plates (subtle motion, style-preserving negative); ALL text is an animated Remotion DOM overlay (NEVER baked); slate/grid/CTA scenes get no i2v; the closing grid is a PIL composite of real product webps. eleven_v3 full-sentence VO drives word-by-word burned captions over a VO-forward music bed. Built as a ~50s animated master, then re-cut to 30s FROM the animated master. Values lifted from the source design-brief scene table + meta.json. The runnable scripts live in the source project's working/ (see PIPELINE.md).

concept.single_point: The perfect morning routine is just 4 products (collagen drink, face serum, eye cream, hair treatment) — not twenty.
concept.hook_line: Your morning routine has twenty different products. Why?
concept.concept_label: morning routine (NOT 'skincare' — step 4 is a hair treatment)

character.mode: anchor-ref (fresh flat-vector — NOT a chained photoreal ref)
character.anchor_prompt: Flat-vector illustration of a woman, late 20s, soft brown wavy shoulder-length hair, warm-medium skin tone, cream slip-dress. Clean 2D flat-vector style (Spotify/Anchor lineage), no gradients, no photoreal shading. Consistent character across every scene.
character.style_reference_note: The brand's existing character (clients/spoiled-child/shared/characters/anchor/character-anchor-05-home-aesthetic.png) is photoreal — use it ONLY as a written descriptor source, NEVER as a `medias` chained ref (it flattens gens to photoreal).

kling.negative_prompt: photorealistic, 3D render, realistic skin, style change, gradient shading, text warp, camera shake
kling._note: Holds flat-vector style at LOW motion only. TEST one scene before batching.

scenes.keyframe_prompt: Creator at a bathroom counter overstuffed with 20+ jars/bottles/tubes from many brands; faintly comedic, overwhelmed.
scenes.vo: Your morning routine has twenty different products.

scenes.motion: small natural smile + shrug; clutter settles
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Same creator, small smile + shrug at the cluttered counter.

scenes.vo: The perfect routine is just four products.

scenes.motion: lifts a tablespoon of amber liquid toward camera; minimal drift
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Creator lifts a tablespoon of amber liquid E27 collagen; teal accent panel.

overlay.tagline: Liquid collagen for glowing skin from within.

scenes.vo: One — liquid collagen. A spoonful at breakfast for skin from within.

scenes.keyframe_prompt: Creator presses S33 serum pump near cheek; peach accent panel.

overlay.tagline: Vitamin-C serum for that morning glow that makes you feel radiant.

scenes.vo: Two — a vitamin-C serum for that morning glow that makes you feel radiant.

scenes.keyframe_prompt: Creator dabs eye cream under-eye; lavender accent panel.

overlay.tagline: An eye cream — your eyes will de-puff in minutes.

scenes.vo: Three — an eye cream, and your eyes will de-puff in minutes.

scenes.motion: runs hands through hair, soft steam
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Creator runs hands through hair, soft steam; warm rust accent panel.

overlay.tagline: A rinse-in treatment that leaves your hair shining all day.

scenes.vo: Four — a rinse-in hair treatment that leaves your hair shining all day.

scenes.motion: satisfied smile, holding 1 product; clean bathroom (callback to scene 1)
scenes.keyframe_prompt: Creator at mirror, satisfied smile, holding one product; clean bathroom.
scenes.vo: Skip the twenty-step routine. Build the four-product one.
Spoiled Child. Your morning routine, simplified. Spoiledchild dot com.

product_grid.method: PIL composite of the 4 REAL product webps (never AI — AI duplicates SKUs)

voice._note: Write VO as FULL SENTENCES (not keyword fragments). with-timestamps char-level timings drive the word-by-word captions.

music.prompt: Lo-fi pop bed, 95-105 BPM, builds across sections (intro pad -> groove -> warm -> lo-fi build -> resolved). NOT cinematic, NOT moody. No melody hooks competing with VO. Instrumental only.
music.mix_profile: VO-forward: vo loudnorm I=-15, music loudnorm I=-25 + volume 0.5, sidechaincompress duck, final alimiter limit=0.89, target ~-15 LUFS / -1 dBTP

captions.method: word-by-word burned from eleven_v3 with-timestamps (libass; Klap is the hosted equivalent)
captions._suppress_note: slate/grid/CTA scenes carry their own on-screen text — two text layers collide.

cutdowns.source: working/silent-master.mp4 (the ANIMATED master — NEVER a static intermediate)
cutdowns.rules: trim short beats (never freeze); gently slow long beats (setpts, clamp <=1.6x); re-burn scaled captions (timestamps / vo_speedup, offset to new scene starts); suppress on 3/8/10

variants.v1: full 10-beat story, VO @1.25x (atempo), silences trimmed, ~30s — THE SHIPPED DELIVERABLE
variants.v2: hook-led montage: hook -> slate -> grid pulled forward -> rapid 4-product montage (number + product only) -> CTA, ~30s (>=4 cuts/10s)

music.note: lo-fi pop bed under the VO, default on

end_card.note: CTA + brand wordmark scene, default on
